blended.narrative: Sugarbush is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
